chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No. 2469 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Present: Mr. Justice Omar Sial Mr. Justice Miran Muhammad Shah For hearing of bail application 20.10.2025 Mr. Zahoor Ahmed, advocate for applicant. Mr. Muhammad Iqbal Awan, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-. OMAR SIAL, J.- Muhammad Aslam has sought post arrest bail in crime number 156 of 2025 registered under sections 9(I) 3-B of CNS Amendment Act, 2022 at Police Station Nazimabad, Karachi. His earlier bail application was dismissed vide order dated 03.09.2025 by the learned Special Judge, Narcotics/Sessions Judge, Karachi (Central). 2. Aslam was arrested on 01.04.2025 by SIP Taj Muhammad while he was in possession of 510 grams of charas. 3. We have heard the learned counsel for the applicant and the learned Additional Prosecutor General. Our observations are as follows. 4. The offence with which the applicant is charged, although not bailable, falls within the non-prohibitory clause of section 497 Cr.P.C. Keeping in mind the principles enunciated in Tariq Bashir and 5 others vs The State (PLD 1985 SC 34), we do not see any exceptional or extraordinary ground to deny the applicant bail. It is also yet to be seen whether the applicant himself is a user of narcotics and, in essence, a victim of the drug trade. The State is yet to establish effective rehabilitation institutions for this purpose. The 2 applicant is admitted to bail subject to his furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs. 100,000 and a P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned trial Court. JUDGE JUDGE Saleem/PS
